title: HOT BARGAINS 100 X 6oz/180ml Hinged Sauce Pots Clear Round Reusable Plastic Containers with Lids (100)
features: Perfect Portion Control – Each 6oz container is ideal for holding sauces, dips, dressings, condiments, and even snacks or jello shots—great for precise servings at home or on the go.
Leakproof Hinged Lids – Secure snap-closure lids help prevent spills and leaks, making them ideal for transport, lunchboxes, takeout, and meal prep.
Durable & Food Safe – Made from high-quality, BPA-free plastic that’s strong, odor-free, and safe for food contact. Suitable for cold or room-temperature items.
Disposable & Stackable Design – Single-use containers offer easy cleanup after use, while their stackable design helps save space in storage or during transport.
Versatile for Every Setting – Great for home kitchens, catering, delis, food trucks, events, or portioning sauces in restaurants and takeaway orders.

Sauce pots and hinged pots Merchant video Sauce Pots and Hinged Sauce Pots Featuring a classic clear colour and convenient 2oz &4oz sauce pots and 1oz, 2oz,4oz & 6oz size Hinged Sauce Pots, this soufflé/portion cup makes the ideal addition to buffet lines, tasting sessions, take-out, or in-house restaurant use. Use it to serve salad dressings, condiments, sauces, or samples! Available Products are : 1) 2oz and 4oz sauce pots with lids, 2) 1oz, 2oz, 4oz and 6oz Hinged sauce pots 6oz Hinged Sauce Pots Ideal for sauces, dips, dressings, snacks, and condiments—just the right size for meal prep, takeout, or on-the-go use. Each container features a tight-fitting hinged lid to prevent spills and leaks, ensuring freshness and mess-free transport. Made with transparent plastic for quick identification of contents—great for professional kitchens, meal prep, or home organization. Crafted from food-grade, BPA-free polypropylene that’s sturdy enough for reuse but affordable enough to toss after use. Versatile Size You’ll help to control portion sizes and their resulting costs thanks to the all Size of Sauce Pots of this cup. Use it for serving virtually any condiment, sauce, or even small side. From nacho cheese to sour cream, your most popular accoutrements will be served in style and with purpose. Crystal Clear With a classic clear colour, this soufflé/portion cup/deli brings a familiar look to your casual service. It’s great for kitchen-to-table use when filled with your signature sauces or classic condiments while offering complete product visibility. Disposable & Use This pot is conveniently disposable for easy clean-up. Use it alongside china or melamine dinnerware, or reserve it solely for take-out applications. These 2oz hinged clear plastic portion pots are perfect for cafes, restaurants and takeaways to transport sauces, dips, chutneys and ketchups.
